question: How many positive and negative words does Bing Liu's Sentiment Lexicon contain?
expected_answer: Bing Liu's Sentiment Lexicon contains 4783 positive and negative words.

question: According to Hu et al. (2012), what percentage of products in their amazon.com book review dataset were subjected to online review manipulations?
expected_answer: Close to 10.3 percent of products were subjected to online review manipulations.

question: What accuracy did the Naive Bayes model achieve in Tripathy et al. (2015) using K-fold cross-validation on movie review data?
expected_answer: The Naive Bayes model achieved an accuracy of 89.05 percent in K-fold cross-validation on movie review data.

question: What F1 score and mean AUC did the linear SVM model achieve in Borg and Boldt (2020)?
expected_answer: The linear SVM model achieved an F1 score of 83.4 percent and a mean AUC of 0.896 on Swedish telecom customer review data of 168,010 emails.

question: How many encoders and parameters does BERT large have compared to BERT base?
expected_answer: BERT base has 12 encoders and 110 million parameters. BERT large has 24 encoders and 330 million parameters.
